title: Digital Transformation Manager
description:
Job Description

Digital Transformation Manager (Power Platform, Copilot & AI Optimisation)

Location: Singapore / ASEAN (Hybrid)
Department: Digital Transformation / Strategy
Reports to: COO / Managing Director

Role Overview

The Digital Transformation Manager is responsible for modernising, optimising, and scaling existing digital workflows using Microsoft Power Platform, Copilot, and AI-enabled capabilities.

The role focuses on re-engineering legacy or sub-optimal workflows—already digital but inefficient—into intelligent, automated, and insight-driven processes that improve productivity, decision-making, and user experience.

This role requires a strong balance of process engineering, Microsoft platform expertise, and hands-on execution.

Key Responsibilities

1. Workflow Optimisation & Re-engineering

  • Analyse existing digital workflows built on SharePoint, Power Apps, Power Automate, Excel, legacy BPM tools, or custom systems.

  • Identify inefficiencies such as excessive approvals, manual workarounds, disconnected systems, and poor UX.

  • Redesign workflows to be event-driven, automation-first, and AI-assisted.

  • Standardise workflows for scalability, reuse, and governance.

2. Power Platform Enablement

  • Lead the optimisation and modernisation of workflows using:

    • Power Automate (cloud flows, approvals, integrations)

    • Power Apps (model-driven and canvas apps)

    • Dataverse for structured data and security

  • Replace legacy workflows with low-code, maintainable Power Platform solutions.

  • Define Power Platform architecture, environment strategy, and ALM best practices.

3. Copilot & AI-Driven Automation

  • Identify and implement Copilot use cases to augment workflows (e.g. summarisation, decision support, content generation).

  • Embed AI-assisted actions into workflows using:

    • Copilot for Microsoft 365

    • Copilot Studio

    • AI Builder (document processing, prediction, classification)

  • Drive adoption of human-in-the-loop AI workflows where appropriate.

  • Ensure AI usage aligns with security, compliance, and responsible AI principles.

4. Integration & Data Optimisation

  • Improve workflow efficiency by integrating systems via connectors, APIs, and event triggers.

  • Reduce data duplication and re-entry across Microsoft 365, Dynamics, ERP, CRM, and third-party systems.

  • Design workflows to be analytics-ready, enabling insights via Power BI.

  • Establish data models and integration standards across platforms.

5. Business Engagement & Change Management

  • Partner with business stakeholders to translate operational pain points into digital and AI-enabled solutions.

  • Facilitate design workshops, backlog prioritisation, and value mapping sessions.

  • Lead UAT, rollout, training, and adoption programs.

  • Act as a trusted advisor on digital and AI-enabled process optimisation.

6. Governance, Security & Continuous Improvement

  • Define and enforce Power Platform governance, security, and lifecycle management.

  • Establish KPIs to measure workflow efficiency, automation rate, and business impact.

  • Continuously evaluate and improve workflows using usage data and user feedback.

  • Ensure solutions comply with enterprise security and compliance requirements.

Required Experience & Skills

Core Experience

  • 6–10 years in digital transformation, workflow optimisation, or automation roles.

  • Proven experience modernising existing workflows rather than greenfield builds.

  • Strong background in process re-engineering and automation-first design.

  • Experience leading cross-functional digital initiatives end-to-end.

Microsoft Platform Expertise (Strongly Preferred)

  • Power Platform (Power Apps, Power Automate, Dataverse).

  • Copilot for Microsoft 365 and/or Copilot Studio.

  • AI Builder and applied AI use cases.

  • SharePoint Online, Teams, and Microsoft 365 integration.

  • Power BI for operational insights (preferred).

Mindset & Soft Skills

  • Strong systems thinking and ability to simplify complexity.

  • Comfortable working at the intersection of business, IT, and AI.

  • Confident challenging legacy design decisions.

  • Outcome-focused with strong stakeholder communication skills.

  • Hands-on mentality with strategic perspective.

Nice-to-Have

  • Experience in IT services, consulting, or Microsoft partner organisations.

  • Knowledge of ALM, DevOps, and environment management for Power Platform.

  • Exposure to enterprise AI governance or Responsible AI frameworks.

  • Microsoft certifications (Power Platform, Copilot, or Azure AI).

Success Metrics

  • % improvement in workflow cycle time and efficiency.

  • Reduction in manual interventions across workflows.

  • Adoption of Copilot and AI-assisted processes.

  • Stability, scalability, and maintainability of Power Platform solutions.

  • Measurable business value delivered from AI-enabled optimisation.

postedCompany.description:
ABOUT US

At Alfa Connections, business requirements are the primary factors and considerations to why we have chosen to focus on specific Microsoft flagship workload. Such as Microsoft SharePoint and Microsoft Office 365. Dedicated focus have been invested into these solutions to achieve the desired requirements which we have gathered from different business organizations during our much appreciated live demo sessions and solution architecting sessions. We at Alfa Connections prefer to drive in the path of addressing the pain point of the customer with the right solution which determines the product, rather than selling a product that can't achieve to address the pain points of our customers. We infuse within our day to day activities with Microsoft and Nintex Workflow driven messages and designs to ensure employees are clear about our focus solutions. 

 

Alfa Connections provides a full suite of comprehensive IT solutions designed to enhance your organization's productivity and reduce operating and investments costs. Driven by innovation, we integrate crucial business applications on a centralized Microsoft to accelerate communication and optimize the way people work. Our specialists share a common passion to empower your business with the broadest range of customizable and cost-effective IT solutions and services. We adopt an independent approach by delivering all our solutions through our in-house team, thereby eliminating the security and cost concerns that arise from third-party involvement.

 

Our rich business domain experience enables us to speak the same language with customers and understand their business needs easily. This knowledge base and experience help us save clients' precious time and deliver the right solution for every specific situation. Our unique competence in various technologies enables us to deliver integrated, scalable, robust solutions with the optimal cost/performance ratio.
